title: Athletic Logo Design
brief: I have graphics already created with Chat GPT but I need to refine them and get them into formats that I can then use for screen printing, social media, creating my own print graphics, etc. Need the following: PATRIOTS UC Subdued American flag Star icon Chevrons Head UC Patriots Badge Would need spot color info, etc as well as final artwork in multiple file formats (.ai, .eps. JPEG, PDF, etc) both vector based with separate layers and rasterized. I want to be able to edit colors of the artwork outline, stroke, fill, etc. Looking to use military type font and colors including, but not limited to, olive drab, khaki, black, dark grey. Also open to camo patterns, including digital camo.
